title: trueppm-scheduler: A pure-Python critical-path and Monte Carlo schedule-risk engine
description: A dependency-light, Apache-2.0 Python library for project scheduling. Computes a full critical-path method (CPM) schedule with all four dependency types (finish-to-start, start-to-start, finish-to-finish, start-to-finish), calendar-aware working-time lag, total and free float, and cycle detection, and forecasts delivery risk with PERT-Beta Monte Carlo simulation producing P50/P80/P95 completion dates. It is the standalone scheduling core of the TruePPM project-management platform.
